title: Network Services
description: Learn about, then enumerate and exploit a variety of network services and misconfigurations.

title: Boss of the SOC Version 1
description: Experience the original! Boss of the SOC(BOTS) Version 1 debuted at Splunk .conf in October 2016. Since then, thousands of security practitioners have learned how to use core Splunk while completing the realistic and fun BOTSv1 scenarios.

title: Carnage
description: Apply your analytical skills to analyze the malicious network traffic using Wireshark.

title: Ramen Runaway
description: John flew to Japan and accidentally crashed our resume system. Help us bring it back online through the CTF — win it, and you might be our next star!

title: Incident 3122
description: Use the Cortex XDR platform to find the malware infecting the endpoint
